US: US1: Save and insert predefined responses in chats
AC: AC1: Add Saved Response button in Editor nav
Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Observe the Editor nav
4. Verify Saved Responses button
Title: button present next to GIF button
Expectation: - SHOULD display a Saved Responses button next to the GIF button

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Hover over the Saved Responses button
4. Verify tooltip
Title: button tooltip on hover
Expectation: - SHOULD show tooltip: Saved Responses

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Click the Saved Responses button
4. Verify modal
Title: modal opens on button click
Expectation: - SHOULD display the Saved Responses modal

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Press Ctrl/Cmd+K
4. Verify modal
Title: modal opens on Ctrl/Cmd+K shortcut
Expectation: - SHOULD display the Saved Responses modal

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open the Saved Responses modal (has no saved responses)
4. Verify empty state
Title: empty state message
Expectation: - SHOULD display empty state: image + "Your saved responses list is empty. Start by creating your first one to save time during chats."

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open the Saved Responses modal (has saved responses)
4. Verify modal elements
Title: modal structure with saved responses
Expectation:
- SHOULD display X button
- SHOULD display Search box
- SHOULD display Create new button in top-right corner

Title: Create new button tooltip
Expectation: - SHOULD show tooltip: Create New when hovering over Create new button

Title: list ordered by latest updated time
Expectation: - SHOULD display saved response list items below the Search box, ordered by latest updated time

Title: FREQUENTLY USED section — top 5 responses
Expectation:
- SHOULD display FREQUENTLY USED section with top 5 most-used responses
- SHOULD sort by usage_count descending, then title A-Z

Title: FREQUENTLY USED hidden when no usage
Expectation: - SHOULD hide FREQUENTLY USED section if no frequently used responses exist

Title: usage count increments per user on append
Expectation: - SHOULD increment usage count each time a response is appended to the chatbox, counted per user

Title: ALL section sorted A-Z
Expectation: - SHOULD display ALL section listing all saved responses sorted by title A-Z

Title: first response selected by default
Expectation: - SHOULD select the first saved response by default

Title: arrow key navigation
Expectation: - SHOULD allow Up and Down arrow keys to move between responses

Title: message detail panel on right
Expectation: - SHOULD display title and message detail on the right side of the modal for the selected response

Title: 3-dot button on hover over message detail
Expectation: - SHOULD show 3-dot button when hovering over message detail

Title: long message scrollable
Expectation: - SHOULD allow scrolling for long messages in the detail view

Title: hover title updates detail view
Expectation: - SHOULD update the message detail view when hovering over a title in the list

Title: click title fills chatbox
Expectation: - SHOULD fill the chatbox with the response message when clicking on a title

Title: pagination loads 20 items with Load more
Expectation: - SHOULD load 20 items per page and show Load more on scroll

Title: footer shortcuts
Expectation: - SHOULD display footer with shortcuts: X button or Esc to close popup

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open the Saved Responses modal
4. Click X button or press Esc
5. Verify modal
Title: X button / Esc closes modal
Expectation: - SHOULD close the Saved Responses modal

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open the Saved Responses modal
4. Observe the Search box (unfocused)
5. Verify Search box default state
Title: search box default state
Expectation: - SHOULD display Search box empty with placeholder: Search saved response

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open the Saved Responses modal
4. Click/focus the Search box
5. Verify placeholder
Title: placeholder on focus
Expectation: - SHOULD change placeholder to: Enter keyword...

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open the Saved Responses modal
4. {method} a keyword in the Search box
5. Verify search input
Title: input shows x icon
Expectation: - SHOULD display an x icon when text is entered

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open the Saved Responses modal
4. Enter a keyword in Search
5. Click x icon or press backspace to remove text
6. Verify list
Title: x icon / backspace clears search and restores list
Expectation: - SHOULD remove text and show the full response list

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open the Saved Responses modal
4. Type 1 character in Search
5. Verify search triggers
Title: search starts from 1 character
Expectation: - SHOULD start searching from the first character entered

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open the Saved Responses modal
4. Search by title partial keyword (any case)
5. Verify results
Title: search matches by title (case-insensitive, partial)
Expectation: - SHOULD return matching results based on title field (case-insensitive, partial match)

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open the Saved Responses modal
4. Search by message body partial keyword (any case)
5. Verify results
Title: search matches by message (case-insensitive, partial)
Expectation: - SHOULD return matching results based on message field (case-insensitive, partial match)

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open the Saved Responses modal
4. Search for a keyword with no matching results
5. Verify state
Title: no results state
Expectation: - SHOULD show: Search results (0)

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open the Saved Responses modal
4. Search for a keyword with matching results
5. Verify result list
Title: results found state
Expectation: - SHOULD show: Search results ({number_of_matched_results}) and list results as per AC2

Title: first search result selected by default
Expectation: - SHOULD select the first result by default

Title: search pagination loads 20 items
Expectation: - SHOULD load every 20 items in search results

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open the Saved Responses modal
4. Hover over message detail to reveal 3-dot button
5. Click the 3-dot button
6. Verify submenu
Title: submenu options on 3-dot click
Expectation: - SHOULD display submenu with options: Edit response and Delete response

AC: AC5: Add a new saved response
Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open the Saved Responses modal
4. Click Create new button
5. Verify popup
Title: Create Saved Response popup opens
Expectation: - SHOULD display Create Saved Response popup with title: Create Saved Response

Title: popup X button closes
Expectation: - SHOULD close the popup when clicking [X] button

Title: TITLE field — required, tooltip, placeholder
Expectation:
- SHOULD display TITLE field as required
- SHOULD show tooltip: Used to organize responses. This won't appear in messages.
- SHOULD show placeholder: Name this response for easy search

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open Create Saved Response popup
4. Paste text exceeding 140 characters in TITLE field
5. Verify input
Title: TITLE field 140 char max — excess cut on paste
Expectation: - SHOULD allow max 140 characters; excess text cut off on paste

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open Create Saved Response popup
4. Observe MESSAGE field
5. Verify field properties
Title: MESSAGE field — required, placeholder, no text-formatting
Expectation:
- SHOULD display MESSAGE field as required
- SHOULD show placeholder: Write the full message you want to send to clients
- SHOULD NOT allow text-formatting

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open Create Saved Response popup
4. Paste text exceeding 10,000 characters in MESSAGE field
5. Verify input and character count
Title: MESSAGE field 10000 char max — count display and cut on paste
Expectation: - SHOULD allow max 10,000 characters; show character count as {X}/10000; cut off excess on paste

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open Create Saved Response popup
4. Observe Save and Cancel buttons (both fields empty)
5. Verify button states
Title: Save disabled, Cancel enabled by default
Expectation:
- SHOULD display Save button as disabled
- SHOULD display Cancel button as enabled

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open Create Saved Response popup
4. Fill in both TITLE and MESSAGE fields
5. Verify Save button
Title: Save enabled when both fields filled
Expectation: - SHOULD enable Save button when both TITLE and MESSAGE are filled

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open Create Saved Response popup
4. Click Cancel button
5. Verify popup
Title: Cancel button closes popup
Expectation: - SHOULD close the popup

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open Create Saved Response popup
4. Fill in both fields
5. Click Save
6. Verify toast
Title: Save shows success toast
Expectation: - SHOULD display toast: New Saved Response created.

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open the Saved Responses modal
4. Hover over message detail, click 3-dot button
5. Click Edit response
6. Verify popup
Title: Edit Saved Response popup opens
Expectation: - SHOULD display Edit Saved Response popup with title: Edit Saved Response

Title: fields pre-populated with existing data
Expectation: - SHOULD pre-populate TITLE and MESSAGE fields with existing saved response data

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open Edit Saved Response popup (no changes made)
4. Click [X] button or Cancel button
5. Verify popup
Title: X / Cancel closes popup without changes
Expectation: - SHOULD close the popup when no changes have been made

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open Edit Saved Response popup
4. Make changes to a field
5. Click [X] button or Cancel button
6. Verify prompt
Title: X / Cancel with unsaved changes shows Discard Changes popup
Expectation: - SHOULD show Discard Changes? popup with text: Are you sure you want to go? Changes have not been saved yet.

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open Edit Saved Response popup
4. Update fields
5. Click Save
6. Verify toast
Title: Save shows updated toast
Expectation: - SHOULD display toast: Saved Response updated successfully.

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open the Saved Responses modal
4. Hover over message detail, click 3-dot button
5. Click Delete response
6. Verify confirmation popup
Title: Delete confirmation popup shown
Expectation:
- SHOULD display confirmation popup titled: Delete Response?
- SHOULD show text: This response will be permanently deleted and can't be recovered. Are you sure you want to proceed?

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Trigger delete confirmation popup
4. Click OK button
5. Verify result
Title: OK button deletes and shows toast
Expectation: - SHOULD delete the response and display toast: Saved Response deleted.

AC: AC8: Add saved response to chatbox
Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open the Saved Responses modal
4. {method} on a saved response (click title or press Enter)
5. Verify chatbox
Title: response appended to chatbox on click/Enter
Expectation: - SHOULD append the full message content into the chatbox, behind current text

US: US2: Create saved response from a conversation message
AC: AC1: Add Save this response button to Coach's message
Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Hover over a non-text message sent by the Coach
4. Verify button
Title: Save this response button appears on hover
Expectation: - SHOULD display a button between the 3-dot and Reply buttons with tooltip: Saved this response

Step:
1. Login as Coach on a workspace with a paid plan (Pro/Studio)
2. Open a conversation
3. Hover over a Coach non-text message
4. Verify button visibility
Title: button visible on paid plan only
Expectation: - SHOULD show the Save this response button only if workspace is on a paid plan (Pro, Studio)

AC: AC2: Add new saved response from the conversation
Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Hover over a Coach non-text message
4. Click the Save this response button
5. Verify popup
Title: Add To Saved Responses popup opens
Expectation: - SHOULD show popup titled: Add To Saved Responses

Title: Title blank, Message pre-populated
Expectation:
- SHOULD leave Title field blank
- SHOULD pre-populate Message field with the Coach's message (max 10,000 characters)

Step:
1. Login as Coach
2. Open a conversation
3. Open Add To Saved Responses popup
4. Fill in Title, verify Message pre-populated
5. Click Save
6. Verify toast
Title: Save shows response saved toast
Expectation: - SHOULD display toast: Response has been saved
